
---

## Install / Upgrade

**npm** (recommended):

```bash
npm install -g @jlovec/zhushen@${TAG} --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org
```

**Homebrew**:

```bash
brew upgrade jlovec1024/tap/zs
# or first-time install
brew install jlovec1024/tap/zs
```

**Docker**:

```bash
# CLI
docker pull ghcr.io/jlovec1024/zs-runner:${TAG}

# Hub
docker pull ghcr.io/jlovec1024/zs-hub:${TAG}
```

See the full [Installation Guide](https://github.com/jlovec1024/hapi/blob/main/docs/guide/installation.md) for more options.
